subcodes.first_line: The Pen hath borne witness that there is none other God but Me, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, and the Tongue hath testified that there is none other God but Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد القلم انه لا اله الا انا المهیمن القیوم و شهد اللسان انه لا اله الا انا
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action
